D0B75638021B19A6!201814.ocr_text: --- Page 1 --- X ( ( مل WHAT IS DIFFERENT, IS DANGEROUS  125 124 CULTURES AND ORGANIZATIONS The usefulness of combining UAI and MAS foi studying motivation patterns was suggested by a comparison of the IBM survey results with the work of David McClelland.
